source: Luat BHXH 2014, Luat Viec lam 2013, Nghi dinh 58/2020/ND-CP
base_wage_note: Muc luong co so — 2.34tr/thang tu 01/07/2024 (Nghi dinh 73/2024/ND-CP).

caps.note: BHXH/BHYT cap = 20 x luong co so. BHTN cap = 20 x luong toi thieu vung I (thay doi theo dia ban lam viec).

employer_rates_pct.includes: 17.5% BHXH gom 14% huu tri, 3% om dau/thai san, 0.5% tai nan lao dong.

union_fee_note: Kinh phi cong doan 2% tren quy luong dong BHXH, nop cho lien doan lao dong dia phuong.
